summary: Frontend-only testing of updated Estratégia FB feature with NEW logic (all 3 pair-combinations). All 8 scenarios from review_request verified passing: pair (b,c), pair (a,c), pair (a,b), no-pattern same-root, Formada history-order display, multi-pattern coexistence, hit-no-removal, countdown-only removal, LIMPAR clearing, horizontal compact layout visibility.
passed_tests: TEST A - b,c share root (target=a): giros [5,3,12] → Formada=[12,3,5], Entrada=[5,14,23,32], (3 tentativas) - VERIFIED
TEST B - a,c share root (target=b): giros [5,15,23] → Formada=[23,15,5], Entrada=[6,15,24,33], (3 tentativas) - VERIFIED
TEST C - a,b share root (target=c): giros [24,6,18] → Formada=[18,6,24], Entrada=[9,18,27,36], (3 tentativas) - VERIFIED
TEST D - all 3 share root: giros [1,10,19] → no pattern, empty state - VERIFIED
TEST E - Multiple concurrent patterns: giros [5,3,12,4] → 2 patterns: [12,3,5] @ 2 tentativas AND [4,12,3] @ 3 tentativas (both coexist) - VERIFIED

TEST F - Hit no-removal: after [5,3,12] pattern with entry=[5,14,23,32], adding 14 (a hit) DOES NOT remove it; original stays at 2 tentativas. New pattern [14,12,3] also created concurrently - VERIFIED
TEST G - LIMPAR clears all FB patterns and giros state - VERIFIED
TEST H - Countdown-only removal: original [12,3,5] countdown 3 → 2 → 1 → removed at 0 after adding 3 subsequent numbers (7,8,9) - VERIFIED
Horizontal mode: 2 concurrent FB patterns visible with correct Formada/Entrada display; fb-card is rendered and readable (height ~190px) - VERIFIED
critical_code_review_comments: RadarTab.jsx is 693 lines - close to split threshold. Consider extracting FB detection (detectFBPattern, FB_OCULTOS, digitalRoot, getFBEntry) into /app/frontend/src/engine/fbEngine.js for unit testability.

Pattern key uses `${a}-${b}-${c}-${giros.length}` (line 202) which includes length, so duplicate triplets at different positions get unique keys - good. However, if the same exact pattern re-triggers within one render (not possible with current flow) keys would clash; current logic is fine.
The countdown+detect logic runs in useEffect on [giros]; prevGirosLen guard correctly distinguishes add vs undo vs reset. Works correctly as tested.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Updated FB logic fully working. detectFBPattern now handles all 3 pair combinations (b,c) | (a,c) | (a,b). Formed always displayed in history order [c,b,a] (newest first). Patterns persist until countdown reaches 0; hits do NOT cause early removal. Multiple concurrent patterns supported with independent per-pattern countdowns. LIMPAR clears state. Horizontal compact layout renders fb-card correctly with 2+ patterns visible.
